extra._comment_apiBaseUrl: For Expo Go on physical device, use your machine's LAN IP (e.g., 192.168.1.10), NOT localhost
extra._comment_firebase: Firebase Web SDK config from Firebase Console → Project Settings → Web App. Optional for dev mode (demo accounts), required for production Firebase auth.
extra._comment_eas: EAS Project ID for Expo Application Services (builds, updates, etc.)
